Project.NAME: monorepo-template
Project.keywords: monorepo-template, nx, bun, go, nextjs, vite, rest, graphql, gqlgen, postgresql, redis, telegram-bot, grace, product-verified, technical-verified, prd-waves, prd-wave-details, backend-waves
Project.annotation: Full-stack Nx monorepo template governed by GRACE artifacts and verification gates.

M-GRACE-WORKFLOW.NAME: GraceAgentWorkflow
M-GRACE-WORKFLOW.purpose: Agent operating guide, shared GRACE artifacts, operational packet templates, and file-local semantic markup rules for meaningful repo changes.

export-agentGuide.PURPOSE: Route agents through GRACE skills, docs-first workflow, focused verification, and file-local markup rules.

export-fileLocalContracts.PURPOSE: Require MODULE_CONTRACT, MODULE_MAP, semantic anchors, and CHANGE_SUMMARY for new or meaningfully edited governed files.

export-changeFlow.PURPOSE: Define the read, contract, implement, verify, refresh, and lint sequence.

export-operationalPackets.PURPOSE: Define worker packet, graph delta, verification delta, and failure handoff shapes.

M-WORKSPACE.NAME: WorkspaceOrchestration
M-WORKSPACE.purpose: Root package scripts, Nx configuration, project target graph, and shared development commands.

export-dev.PURPOSE: Run local API, web-admin, and public web serve targets through Nx without requiring bot credentials.

export-build.PURPOSE: Run all build targets through Nx.

export-test.PURPOSE: Run all test targets through Nx.

export-lint.PURPOSE: Run all lint targets through Nx.

export-codegen.PURPOSE: Run API sqlc, API gqlgen, and web-admin GraphQL codegen targets with generated-drift validation.

export-verifyCoverage.PURPOSE: Run the full coverage, e2e, XML, and GRACE handoff gate during explicit coverage, release, or template handoff phases.

M-COVERAGE-GATE.NAME: CoverageGate
M-COVERAGE-GATE.purpose: Repo-local coverage and e2e gate enforcing 100 percent thresholds for non-allowlisted code only when an explicit coverage, release, or template handoff phase invokes it.
M-COVERAGE-GATE.depends: M-WORKSPACE, M-GRAPHQL-SCHEMA, M-API, M-WEB-ADMIN, M-WEB, M-BOT

export-config.PURPOSE: Define thresholds, Go profiles, TypeScript summaries, and allowlist.

export-e2ePreflight.PURPOSE: Start Docker Compose PostgreSQL and Redis for Playwright.

export-playwrightMatrix.PURPOSE: Verify API health/readiness, admin GraphQL CRUD, and public REST browser users flows in Chromium.

export-testCompose.PURPOSE: Start isolated PostgreSQL and Redis for coverage and e2e gates.

export-safeDatabaseTarget.PURPOSE: Reject `monorepo_dev`, dev port `7501`, empty DSNs, and malformed DSNs before destructive cleanup.

M-CI-CD.NAME: GitLabDokployCICD
M-CI-CD.purpose: GitLab CI/CD pipeline, department runner pool contract, tested CI helpers, image publishing, release metadata, public Next web image deployment, and Dokploy compose deployment contract.
M-CI-CD.depends: M-WORKSPACE, M-COVERAGE-GATE, M-API, M-WEB-ADMIN, M-WEB, M-BOT

export-pipeline.PURPOSE: Run GitLab CI workflow for MR, develop, main, and release tags.

export-releaseGate.PURPOSE: Assert production tags are SemVer and reachable from origin/main.

export-imageMetadata.PURPOSE: Record service image refs, digests, commit SHA, and pipeline ID.

export-dokployDeploy.PURPOSE: Update Dokploy compose image variables plus WEB_API_BASE_URL and trigger compose deployment.

export-runnerPool.PURPOSE: Define department group runner tags, concurrency, protected-runner boundaries, and Docker-in-Docker guardrails.

M-GO-CONFIG.NAME: GoConfig
M-GO-CONFIG.purpose: Shared Go config loading and validation package for API and bot apps.

export-Load.PURPOSE: Load configuration from files and environment.

M-GO-LOGGER.NAME: GoLogger
M-GO-LOGGER.purpose: Shared zap logger package, request ID helpers, context helpers, and HTTP middleware.

export-FromContext.PURPOSE: Read request-scoped logger values from context.

export-Middleware.PURPOSE: Attach logging and request ID behavior to HTTP handlers.

M-GRAPHQL-SCHEMA.NAME: GraphQLSchema
M-GRAPHQL-SCHEMA.purpose: Admin GraphQL SDL for user, pagination, error, and web-admin backend auth contracts.

type-Query.PURPOSE: Read user and users connection operations.

type-Mutation.PURPOSE: Create, update, and delete user operations.

type-CreateUserResult.PURPOSE: Typed create-user success and error union.

type-UpdateUserResult.PURPOSE: Typed update-user success and error union.

type-AdminUser.PURPOSE: Current admin identity returned by session-backed auth operations.

type-AdminAuthResult.PURPOSE: Typed login, logout, and create-admin success/error unions.

M-API.NAME: GoSharedHTTPAPI
M-API.purpose: Go HTTP API serving health, protected admin GraphQL, and public REST endpoints with goose migrations, sqlc-generated user/admin queries, and Redis-backed admin sessions.

export-main.PURPOSE: API startup, config, middleware, REST routes, GraphQL server, and graceful shutdown.

fn-userRepository.PURPOSE: PostgreSQL users repository adapter backed by sqlc-generated pgx/v5 queries.

fn-userHandlers.PURPOSE: REST `/api/users` handler entry points for public user operations.

fn-userResolvers.PURPOSE: Generated admin GraphQL resolver entry points for user operations.

class-AdminAuthService.PURPOSE: First-admin bootstrap, login, current admin, create admin, and logout service.

fn-adminSessionStore.PURPOSE: Redis-backed opaque session store using HMAC-derived keys.

fn-adminAuthMiddleware.PURPOSE: Session-cookie principal hydration, GraphQL cookie bridge, and admin origin guard.

M-WEB-ADMIN.NAME: ViteWebAdminApp
M-WEB-ADMIN.purpose: Vite web-admin SPA using cookie-credentialed GraphQL transport, generated GraphQL client types, React Router, and React Query.

export-ViteRouter.PURPOSE: Vite React Router pages for admin home, users list, create, and detail routes.

export-AdminAuthOperations.PURPOSE: Generated-visible loginAdmin, logoutAdmin, CurrentAdmin, and createAdmin operation documents.

export-AdminAuthFrontend.PURPOSE: CurrentAdmin-backed auth provider, auth GraphQL helpers, safe return-to parsing, and shell user mapping.

export-ProtectedAdminLayout.PURPOSE: Protects every non-login web-admin route before rendering the sidebar shell.

export-LoginPage.PURPOSE: Public login form for backend cookie-backed admin sessions.

export-SidebarLogout.PURPOSE: Sidebar user-menu logout action that revokes the backend session, disables while pending, clears protected frontend query caches, and returns to login.

export-UiKit.PURPOSE: Approved Radix Rhea @shared/ui primitive, sidebar-07 shell, theme toggle, and layout surface for admin pages with zinc/sidebar base tokens and indigo theme accents.

export-UiKitReferenceRoute.PURPOSE: Visible /ui-kit route demonstrating approved admin components.

export-SidebarShell.PURPOSE: Adapt shadcn sidebar-07 into the global web-admin shell with app-owned route metadata and shared UI rendering.

constraint-PageUiImports.PURPOSE: Admin pages import UI from @shared/ui only, enforced by web-admin ESLint.

M-WEB.NAME: NextPublicWebApp
M-WEB.purpose: Next.js public web app using REST users client, React Query client components, and an independent public UI-kit surface.

export-AppRouter.PURPOSE: Next.js App Router public page and layout.

export-RestUsersClient.PURPOSE: REST users client for `/api/users` JSON envelopes.

export-Config.PURPOSE: Same-origin browser REST base plus server/runtime WEB_API_BASE_URL parsing and defaults.

export-UiKit.PURPOSE: Independent Radix Rhea apps/web @shared/ui primitive and theme toggle surface for public pages with Tailwind v4 semantic zinc base tokens and indigo theme accents.

constraint-IndependentUiKit.PURPOSE: Public web UI primitives remain separate from web-admin UI primitives.

M-BOT.NAME: TelegramBot
M-BOT.purpose: Telegram bot app with config, logging middleware, recovery middleware, and command handlers.

export-main.PURPOSE: Bot startup, middleware, handlers, and graceful shutdown.

M-API-NUTRITION.NAME: AtlasNutritionModule
M-API-NUTRITION.purpose: Atlas WAVE-05 Nutrition module: KJBJU product catalog, weekly meal templates with item CRUD, daily nutrition overrides with item CRUD, factual daily nutrition logs with snapshot entries, macro calculation engine with add/subtract/replace operations, and GraphQL union error resolvers.

export-NutritionProductService.PURPOSE: Product CRUD with soft-delete, name validation, macro non-negative check.

export-NutritionTemplateService.PURPOSE: Weekly template upsert with cascading item loading.

export-NutritionTemplateItemService.PURPOSE: Template item CRUD with template ownership check.

export-DailyNutritionOverrideService.PURPOSE: Daily override upsert with isolated item CRUD.

export-DailyNutritionLogService.PURPOSE: Factual daily nutrition get-or-create, entry CRUD, product snapshots, and snapshot-based totals.

export-NutritionMacroService.PURPOSE: KJBJU calculation per RULE-010/RULE-011 with ADD/SUBTRACT/REPLACE operations.

export-NutritionGraphQLSchema.PURPOSE: Types, inputs, enums, union results, queries, and mutations for all 5 entities.

export-NutritionResolvers.PURPOSE: PIN auth-guarded GraphQL resolvers with union error returns.

constraint-MacroCalc.PURPOSE: Soft-deleted products contribute 0 macros. Override REPLACE removes all template occurrences of same product.

M-PRODUCT-DOCS.NAME: ProductDocs
M-PRODUCT-DOCS.purpose: Product background, glossary, journeys, personas, business rules, and data dictionary used as planning context.

M-PRODUCT-DOCS-VERIFIER.NAME: ProductDocsVerifierSkill
M-PRODUCT-DOCS-VERIFIER.purpose: Project-local Codex skill whose main controller launches primary scope-orchestrators, records source deltas for new docs or answered questions, aggregates outputs, stages structure under `.tasks`, runs the consistency scope, then synthesizes source-backed facts and approved derivations into `docs/product-verified` after approval.

export-skill-instructions.PURPOSE: Guide review, synthesis, traceability, and validation.

export-output-contract.PURPOSE: Define required verified product docs structure, including traceability and derivation logs.

export-scope-orchestrator-contract.PURPOSE: Define the main controller, per-scope orchestrator role, dispatch phases, write ownership, worker/reviewer prompts, approval loop, source-delta handling, interruption retry policy, consistency relaunch behavior, and question ledger.

export-scaffold-script.PURPOSE: Scaffold staging verified docs from complete source inventory.

export-validate-script.PURPOSE: Validate final verified docs, traceability, derivations, and question sync before handoff.

M-TECHNICAL-DOCS-VERIFIER.NAME: TechnicalDocsVerifierSkill
M-TECHNICAL-DOCS-VERIFIER.purpose: Project-local Codex skill for consuming `docs/product-verified`, running technical scope-orchestrator loops, preserving question-answer deltas, and producing `docs/technical-verified` with `approved-to-dev` only when no blocking technical questions or answer-spawned blockers remain.

export-skill-instructions.PURPOSE: Guide technical readiness review, question-loop reruns, approval gating, and validation.

export-output-contract.PURPOSE: Define required technical-verified docs structure, statuses, stable ids, and question ledger format.

export-scope-orchestrator-contract.PURPOSE: Define technical review scopes, nested worker/reviewer loops, answer-effect checks, write ownership, and prompt templates.

export-scaffold-script.PURPOSE: Scaffold staging technical docs from a verified product source inventory.

export-validate-script.PURPOSE: Validate final technical docs, placeholder policy, status values, and open blocking question invariants.

export-openai-metadata.PURPOSE: Expose Codex UI metadata for the skill.

M-PRD-WAVE-DECOMPOSER.NAME: PrdWaveDecomposerSkill
M-PRD-WAVE-DECOMPOSER.purpose: Project-local Codex skill for consuming raw PRD, verified PRD, and optional technical readiness docs, running subagent scope-mapper and reviewer loops, and producing `docs/prd-waves` as a shallow backend-only implementation wave map plus per-page frontend handoff files.

export-skill-instructions.PURPOSE: Guide raw and verified source gating, shallow backend wave mapping, per-page frontend files, subagent orchestration, reviewer approval, and validation.

export-output-contract.PURPOSE: Define prd-waves docs structure, statuses, stable ids, reviewer verdicts, backend-only wave restrictions, per-page frontend restrictions, raw/verified PRD traceability, question ledgers, and approval gates.

export-scope-orchestrator-contract.PURPOSE: Define scope-mapper, mapper worker, reviewer, final consistency, write ownership, retry policy, and prompt templates.

export-scaffold-script.PURPOSE: Scaffold staging PRD wave docs from raw product, verified product, and technical source inventories.

export-validate-script.PURPOSE: Validate PRD wave docs, reviewer approvals, stable ids, frontend page files, raw/verified page traceability, shallow-only restrictions, and open blocker sync.

export-openai-metadata.PURPOSE: Expose Codex UI metadata for the skill.

M-PRD-WAVE-DETAILER.NAME: PrdWaveDetailerSkill
M-PRD-WAVE-DETAILER.purpose: Project-local Codex skill for consuming one approved shallow backend PRD wave, checking codebase and neighboring-backend-wave fit, reading frontend-pages dependency context, running nested specialist planner and reviewer loops, and producing `docs/prd-wave-details` with one ready-for-dev selected backend wave brief.

export-skill-instructions.PURPOSE: Guide selected backend-wave source gating, codebase and neighboring-backend-wave context inventory, frontend-pages dependency context, one-wave subagent orchestration, reviewer approval, question capture, and user approval pause points.

export-output-contract.PURPOSE: Define prd-wave-details docs structure, statuses, stable ids, reviewer verdicts, AC/EC/test ids, question ledgers, and ready-for-dev gates.

export-wave-orchestrator-contract.PURPOSE: Define specialist planner, reviewer, final fit review, write ownership, retry policy, and prompt templates.

export-scaffold-script.PURPOSE: Scaffold staging detailed backend PRD wave docs for one selected backend wave from shallow backend wave, product, technical, and frontend-pages context inventories.

export-validate-script.PURPOSE: Validate detailed backend PRD wave docs, backend-only ready-for-dev invariants, reviewer approvals, criteria ids, codebase fit, and open blocker sync.

export-openai-metadata.PURPOSE: Expose Codex UI metadata for the skill.

M-BACKEND-WAVE-PLANNER.NAME: BackendWavePlannerSkill
M-BACKEND-WAVE-PLANNER.purpose: Project-local Codex skill for consuming approved technical readiness docs, building a shallow full backend wave map, and producing exactly one current reviewer-approved ready-for-dev backend wave before asking for explicit user approval to continue.

export-skill-instructions.PURPOSE: Guide technical approval gating, sequential wave planning, reviewer approval, question capture, and user approval pause points.

export-output-contract.PURPOSE: Define backend-waves docs structure, statuses, stable ids, reviewer verdicts, question ledgers, and approval gates.

export-wave-orchestrator-contract.PURPOSE: Define wave planner/reviewer roles, required reviewer perspectives, write ownership, retry policy, and prompt templates.

export-scaffold-script.PURPOSE: Scaffold staging backend wave docs from approved technical and product source inventories.

export-validate-script.PURPOSE: Validate backend wave docs, ready-for-dev invariants, reviewer approvals, criteria ids, and open blocker sync.

export-openai-metadata.PURPOSE: Expose Codex UI metadata for the skill.

M-PLAN-TO-BEADS-SKILL.NAME: PlanToBeadsSkill
M-PLAN-TO-BEADS-SKILL.purpose: Project-local Codex skill for converting source plans into source-anchored Beads milestone, implementation, full-test-coverage, pre-MR-QA epic, and task graphs.

export-skill-instructions.PURPOSE: Guide semantic-loss control, requirement mapping, milestone-plus-three-epic structure, acceptance criteria, delivery contours, and QA closure.

export-openai-metadata.PURPOSE: Expose Codex UI metadata for the skill.

M-SUBAGENT-REVIEW-LOOP-SKILL.NAME: SubagentReviewLoopSkill
M-SUBAGENT-REVIEW-LOOP-SKILL.purpose: Project-local Codex skill for running independent subagent review loops over specs, plans, diffs, and other artifacts until approval or an explicit blocker.

export-skill-instructions.PURPOSE: Guide reviewer selection, subagent prompt format, controller adjudication, revision, and targeted re-review.

export-openai-metadata.PURPOSE: Expose Codex UI metadata for the skill.

CrossLink.relation: uses shared config package
uses shared logger package
implements admin GraphQL contract
generates client types from admin GraphQL contract
sends credentialed admin GraphQL requests with session cookies
authenticates through cookie-backed loginAdmin, reads me through CurrentAdmin, and revokes sessions through logoutAdmin
uses public REST users API
uses shared config package
uses shared logger package
governs agent changes to root command and target surfaces
requires verification evidence before shared-surface closeout
orchestrates Nx targets
orchestrates Nx targets
orchestrates Nx targets
orchestrates Nx targets
uses root Bun and Nx scripts
uses codegen drift gates for generated allowlist entries
runs Go coverage and Playwright API contract checks
allowlists sqlc generated users query output with API codegen, build, and repository integration replacement gates
allowlists sqlc generated admin users query output with API codegen, build, and admin repository integration replacement gates
runs web-admin coverage and admin GraphQL browser e2e checks
runs public web coverage and REST browser e2e checks
runs Go coverage and build replacement gate for bot bootstrap
runs Bun and Nx scripts
requires full coverage and e2e gate before deploy-capable branches and release tags
documents runner pool changes as governed infrastructure docs with XML contract alignment
builds and deploys API image
runs admin web checks before release gates
runs public web checks and deploys the public Next web image through Dokploy
builds and deploys bot image
launches per-scope orchestrated review of raw product docs and produces verified handoff docs
consumes verified product docs and turns unresolved implementation gaps into a technical question loop
uses GRACE-governed skill, traceability, and validation expectations before dev handoff
consumes verified PRD scope as the source for shallow backend implementation waves and checks raw PRD scope for frontend page files
uses technical readiness docs when present to expose blockers and boundary risks without detailing implementation
uses GRACE-governed skill artifacts, traceability, validation, and subagent review gates before downstream detailed planning
requires one approved shallow backend source wave and treats frontend-pages/** as read-only dependency context before producing selected-wave ready-for-dev detail
preserves verified product traceability for selected-wave AC, EC, slices, questions, and decisions
uses technical readiness docs when present to ground codebase, data, integration, operations, security, and verification details
uses GRACE contracts, codebase context, validation scripts, and reviewer evidence before implementation handoff
requires approved-to-dev technical docs before decomposing backend work into sequential ready-for-dev waves
may consume an approved shallow PRD wave map before detailing a backend-specific current wave
uses GRACE-governed skill artifacts, traceability, validation, and user approval gates before implementation handoff
converts approved plans into Beads milestone, epic, and task graphs while preserving GRACE source-plan intent
reviews and revises agent-generated artifacts through independent subagent approval loops under controller adjudication
wires nutrition repos, services, and resolvers in main.go and gqlgen config
uses API foundation: postgres pool, sqlc config, gqlgen config, go module path, and middleware auth
